823d41d3-a739-4c7f-ad03-55f7bd53cf24.note: Keegan feels discomfited and tense by Du Zheng's vulnerability and trust, struggling to process the emotional impact. He attempts to regain control by focusing on practical matters.

35af8775-dc6b-4ee6-b13f-937ebaa4e8e8.note: Krueger's possessiveness has deepened. Her "喜欢" (even if drug-induced/trauma-response) fed his ego and reinforced his claim. He's determined to find "the forced one."
